content:
I need to understand the original `_draw_label` method in Biopython's BasicChromosome module to properly monkeypatch it so labels are drawn above instead of below the chromosome.

Let me first check if I can access the source code or understand how the original method works:

function.name: run_custom_test
function.arguments:
{"code": "from Bio.Graphics import BasicChromosome as BC
from Bio.Graphics.BasicChromosome import Chromosome
import inspect

# Get the source of the original _draw_label method
print("Original _draw_label method:")
print(inspect.getsource(Chromosome._draw_label))", "test_snippet": "# Test that we can inspect the method
print("Method inspected successfully")"}
